--- 2026-03-27 (Session 1) ---
## Themes
- Therapy fatigue: wants concrete action, not reflective questioning - has self-awareness already, cannot interrupt the spiral
- Compounding anxiety loop in workplace meetings: paralysis, silence, then replay that raises baseline for next episode
- Business ambition live and emotionally loaded: two working apps, stuck at distribution because public visibility feels impossible
- Self-blame as interpretive default: frames every specific obstacle as personal failure or lack of willingness
## Register
guarded > engaged > distressed (apps/content) > flat compliance
## Open
- "What are the two apps and what has she actually tried for distribution?"
- "Is the preference for invisibility a value or an avoidance pattern?"
- "Depression noted in onboarding - not raised in session at all"
## Claims
- "Every day, really" - catastrophising described as daily not episodic
- "I have built 2 apps right now that are fully working. But I can't get users" - concrete achievement paired with immediate self-blame
- "I can't even post fucking my content... I am the person stopping myself" - dispositional attribution at its sharpest
- "I just never got better" - summary of prior therapy experience
- "I want to talk every day" - high stated motivation, possible reassurance-seeking tendency
